metadata.title: Fluff N' Woof | Specialized Veterinary Hospital in Riyadh
metadata.description: Fluff N' Woof Specialized Veterinary Hospital - Your pet's health and pampering in trusted hands. Veterinary surgeries, vaccinations, grooming, boarding, lab & radiology in Riyadh.

hero.badge: Fluff N' Woof Specialized Veterinary Hospital
hero.title: Your Pet's Health & Pampering
hero.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like to book an appointment at Fluff N' Woof

services.sectionSubtitle: We offer a comprehensive range of specialized veterinary services

surgery.title: Surgeries
surgery.description: Our skilled surgeons perform a wide range of procedures with high precision using advanced facilities imported from Germany

clinics.title: Clinics
clinics.description: Treatment of diseases and injuries with regular check-ups and advanced medical care for your pet
bullets: General treatments for diseases and injuries
Preventive care including microchip implantation and deworming

vaccinations.title: Vaccinations
vaccinations.description: Essential vaccinations to ensure the health and protection of your pet
bullets: We provide core and non-core vaccinations based on your pet's age, lifestyle, and health needs
Routine vaccinations or special travel requirements

grooming.title: Grooming
grooming.description: Pamper your pet with a fresh new look from our professional grooming team, using safe and pet-specific products

petHotel.title: Pet Hotel
petHotel.description: A premium boarding experience for your pet in our hotel specially designed for their comfort and safety
bullets: Custom rooms designed for maximum comfort and luxury
Compliant with AKC (American Kennel Club) standards
Supervised by specialized experts for health and safety

labRadiology.title: Lab & Radiology
labRadiology.description: Using advanced technology to provide accurate diagnostics and develop effective treatment plans
bullets: Rabies antibody titer test (for international travel)

fluffyWheels.title: Fluffy Wheels
fluffyWheels.description: At our clinic, we understand that transporting your pet can sometimes be a challenge. That's why we offer Fluffy Wheels, a convenient pet transportation service designed to make getting your pet to us easier and stress-free.
fluffyWheels.extendedDescription: Whether your pet needs a grooming session, medical check-up, vaccination, surgical procedures, or even a temporary stay, our team ensures they arrive safely and comfortably. Our vehicles are specially equipped to provide a comfortable journey for your pets.

about.story: Fluff N' Woof is the dream of a physician who is an animal lover and passionate breeder. He always wished to find advanced veterinary care worthy of his beloved pet, whom he lost due to a veterinary error during his first year in medical school.
about.storyExtended: This inspired him to open a veterinary hospital that rises to the quality standards of human hospitals, offering the latest and most advanced treatment methods that science has achieved. Our motto is "Your Pet, Our Care".
about.topClinic: We are proud to be among the top

items.text: They are great with humans and pets! Both my dogs were neutered here and they had a very healthy and fast recovery. When my cat got sick I also got him here and he was very well taken care of.
items.name: Hend Saleh

items.text: I had my cat checked for his leg, and the vet was really nice and easy to talk to, For the grooming services, it was awesome as well! The place was also very neat, and smelled really nice. I definitely recommend this place.
items.name: Chantelle Reyes

items.text: The best clinic with excellent care. Dr Momen is a very professional & honest doctor. Mocha our dog is his patient from long time. He did a deep teeth cleaning for Mocha, now she has the Hollywood Smile!
items.name: Alia Al Monla

items.text: Always will be my 1st vet, professional staff and great customer experience. They are not looking out for your money more than taking care of your pet. My 1st choice all the time!
items.name: Riyadh Almazyad

contact.address: Riyadh, Al Qayrawan, Prince Abdullah bin Saud Street
